title: Luzula pallescens
taxonomy: Luzula pallescens is classified within the family Juncaceae. This family consists of over 700 species of rushes and sedges. Luzula pallescens is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Luzula. The genus Luzula is divided into several sections and species based on their morphological characteristics. Luzula pallescens is a type of woodland sedge that is native to Europe.
uses: Luzula pallescens, although not extensively studied, is believed to have some potential medicinal properties.
